title: Digital Realty falls 5% after taking $3.5 billion stake in Blackstone's Virginia data centers
summary_full: Digital Realty fell in premarket trading Tuesday after it announced its buying a $3.5 billion stake in three data centers from asset manager Blackstone.
summary_public: Digital Realty fell in premarket trading Tuesday after it announced its buying a $3.5 billion stake in three data centers from asset manager Blackstone.
